svg.title: System overview — order-triage AgentCore
svg.desc: Left-to-right AWS component map of the order-triage AgentCore system.
svg.text: The whole component map at a glance: Entra CUSTOM_JWT in -> Strands Runtime on Nova Lite -> Cedar-guarded MCP Gateway -> stub Lambdas + OBO into Snowflake, all emitting to CloudWatch
